description: Parallel web search runtime 错误文案

replacements.\"web_search (parallel) needs a Parallel: "web_search（parallel）需要 Parallel API 密钥。请在 Gateway 环境中设置 PARALLEL_API_KEY，或配置 plugins.entries.parallel.config.webSearch.apiKey。"
replacements.message: `plugins.entries.parallel.confi: message: `plugins.entries.parallel.config.webSearch.baseUrl 必须是有效的 http(s) URL。当前值：${value}`
replacements.throw new Error(`Parallel API error (${r: throw new Error(`Parallel API 错误（${res.status}）：${detail || res.statusText}`);
replacements.throw new Error(\"Parallel API returned: throw new Error("Parallel API 返回了格式错误的 JSON", { cause });
